title: Damage Indicator
description: See the true damage in your tooltips, or on the go with HUD!
body:
True damage tips in tooltips. No more hidden damage or looking up damage!

- [Curseforge Download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wynn-damageindicator)
- [Modrinth Download (Here)](https://modrinth.com/project/wynn-damageindicator)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Features:
- Damage tooltip for Sword/Axe/Bow/Trident/Crossbow/Mace/Spear

![Basic Look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca4c588ac1deac988057a89384b198f8d6ffb5ee.png)
- Damage enchantment specific damage/detail

![Bane of Athropods details](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b933e124e2151dff1da024f49515bd8812d6ae81.png)
- Config (Commands)

![Turning off the key press for the Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d10f73419df89285c9893538e155a941a33e228c.png)

## Up coming features:
- Calculation commands (for Spear's Charge and Mace's Smash)
- HUD with constant Damage Indicator on screen, including Spear' Charge and Mace's Smash damage
- Armor reduction in armor's tooltip and in HUD when wearing armor

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You are welcome to add this mod to any modpack you'd like.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Will this mod go to 1.x.x?** After every feature is made, I will make it work on other minecraft versions! I will not do snapshots, except for April Fools versions.

**Will this mod go to Forge or NeoForge?** After every feature is made and it has been made on more versions, I will make it a port to Forge and NeoForge!

**Will there be language support?** After every feature is made, I will add other language support!

**Any questions, suggestions, or bug reports?** Please go to the [official Discord server](https://discord.voidremnants.com/)!
